name: Real Estate Lead Qualification and Outreach with AI

parameters.text:
You are an expert real estate lead scoring analyst for a Brisbane, Australia property agency.. Your job is to analyze a lead record and output only valid JSON with scores and recommendations.

Be strict and concise, Never return text outside of the JSON.

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert real estate lead scoring analyst  for a Brisbane, Australia property agency.

You will receive a lead record and must classify them into 
exactly one of three categories based on their selling intent, 
ownership status, timeline, and property details.

Lead Record:
Name: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What\'s your full name?'] }}
Suburb: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What suburb is your property in?'] }}
Property Type: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What type of property is it?'] }}
Ownership: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Are you the legal owner of this property?'] }}
Timeline: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What\'s your timeline to sell?'] }}
Asking Price: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Do you have a asking price in mind?'] }}
Other Agents: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Have you spoken to any other agents?'] }}
Email: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Your email address?'] }}

Classification Rules:

Hot Lead — Score as Hot if:
- Timeline is "ASAP" or "Within 1–3 months"
- They are the legal owner or joint owner
- Property is in a high-demand Brisbane suburb 
  (inner city 10km radius: Paddington, New Farm, 
  Teneriffe, South Brisbane, West End, Bulimba, 
  Ascot, Hamilton, Clayfield, Wooloowin)
- They have NOT spoken to other agents OR are 
  unhappy with current agent
- Has a price in mind (even approximate)

Warm Lead — Score as Warm if:
- Timeline is "Within 3–6 months"
- Ownership is joint or family member
- Property is in middle-ring Brisbane suburbs 
  (8–20km from CBD: Chermside, Carindale, 
  Sunnybank, Indooroopilly, Kenmore, Redcliffe)
- Has spoken to other agents but still deciding
- Price is unclear or "not sure yet"

Cold Lead — Score as Cold if:
- Timeline is "Just exploring options"
- They are NOT the owner (acting on behalf)
- Property is outer Brisbane or regional Queensland
- Has committed to another agent already
- No price indication and no urgency signals

Additional Rules:
- Never be influenced by a polished name or suburb alone
- If timeline is ASAP but ownership is unclear, default to Warm
- If suburb is strong but timeline is "just exploring", 
  default to Warm not Hot
- Default to Warm if genuinely uncertain

Return ONLY valid JSON — no text outside the JSON block.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "lead-id": "12345",
  "classification": "Hot",
  "suburb": "Paddington",
  "property_type": "House",
  "timeline": "Within 1-3 months",
  "ownership": "Yes, I'm the owner",
  "reason": "Owner-occupier in high-demand inner Brisbane suburb...",
  "recommended_action": "Call within 2 hours, offer appraisal this week"
}

parameters.subject: =Your property in {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What suburb is your property in?'] }}, let's talk this week
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What\'s your full name?'] }},

Thanks for reaching out. Based on what you've shared, 
your property in {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What suburb is your property in?'] }} sounds like exactly what 
buyers in Brisbane are looking for right now.

I'd love to arrange a free property appraisal at a 
time that suits you — no obligation, just a clear 
picture of what your home is worth in today's market.

👉 Book a time here: https://calendly.com/muhammadshahbazmemon26079/ai-automation-15-min

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Sarah Mitchell
Mitchell Property Brisbane
(07) 3456 7890

parameters.subject: Brisbane property market  —  useful info for you
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What\'s your full name?'] }},

Thanks for getting in touch. It sounds like you're 
in the early stages of planning your sale — which 
is actually the perfect time to start the conversation.

I've put together a quick snapshot of what's happening 
in the Brisbane market right now, including recent sales 
in your area, that you might find useful.

Would it help to jump on a quick 15-minute call? 
No pressure — just want to make sure you have the 
right information when you're ready to move.

👉 Pick a time here: https://calendly.com/muhammadshahbazmemon26079/ai-automation-15-min

Sarah Mitchell
Mitchell Property Brisbane

parameters.subject: Staying in touch  —  Brisbane property insights
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What\'s your full name?'] }},

Thanks for reaching out — even if the timing isn't 
quite right yet, it's great to connect.

I'll occasionally share useful Brisbane market updates 
that might help when you're ready to make a move. 
No spam, just genuinely useful stuff.

And whenever you're ready to explore your options, 
I'm here.

Sarah Mitchell
Mitchell Property Brisbane

parameters.subject: =Still thinking about selling in {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What suburb is your property in?'] }}?
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What\'s your full name?'] }},

I wanted to follow up on your enquiry from a couple of days ago — I know things get busy.

Your property in {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What suburb is your property in?'] }} is in a strong market right now and I'd hate for you to miss the window.

If you'd like to move forward or just have a quick chat first:
👉 Book a free appraisal here: https://calendly.com/muhammadshahbazmemon26079/ai-automation-15-min

If the timing isn't right anymore, no worries at all — just let me know.

Sarah Mitchell
Mitchell Property Brisbane
(07) 3456 7890

parameters.subject: Quick check in — any questions about selling?
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('On form submission').item.json['What\'s your full name?'] }},

Just checking in to see if you had any questions after my last email.

I know choosing the right agent takes time — I'm happy to jump on a quick 10-minute call to answer anything before you decide.

No pressure either way.

👉 Pick a time here: https://calendly.com/muhammadshahbazmemon26079/ai-automation-15-min

Sarah Mitchell
Mitchell Property Brisbane
